description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a slim build, standing upright with both arms raised and extended backward in an exaggerated, elongated manner. The person is dressed in a sleeveless top with a scoop neckline and a row of buttons down the front, paired with fitted pants and simple shoes. The figure's hair is medium-length and straight, parted in the middle, and falls just above the shoulders. The arms are unusually long and appear to stretch far behind the body, creating a dramatic visual effect. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes are plain and practical. The overall appearance is casual and modern, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian standing upright with extremely elongated arms stretched backward, wearing a sleeveless top, fitted pants, and simple shoes. The figure has medium-length straight hair and a casual, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, sleeveless top with buttons, and both arms raised and extended backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the close fit of the clothing, and the dramatic backward extension of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and both arms stretching far behind the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the fitted clothing, and the exaggerated backward extension of the right arm.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless buttoned top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised and extended backward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair parted in the middle
